name: yapflow
description: Voice-to-prompt macOS desktop app — lightweight Wispr Flow alternative

scripts.dev: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE YAPFLOW_RUNTIME_PROFILE=development YAPFLOW_DISPLAY_NAME='YapFlow Dev' electron-vite dev
scripts.package:prod: npm run prepare:native && npm run build && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --out-dir=releases/prod --app-id=com.yapflow.app --product-name=YapFlow
scripts.package:test: npm run prepare:native && npm run build && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --out-dir=releases/test --app-id=com.yapflow.app.test --product-name=YapFlow Test
scripts.package:mac: npm run prepare:native && npm run build && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --out-dir=releases/prod --app-id=com.yapflow.app --product-name=YapFlow -- --mac
scripts.package:mac:test: npm run prepare:native && npm run build && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --out-dir=releases/test --app-id=com.yapflow.app.test --product-name=YapFlow Test -- --mac
scripts.package:mac:unsigned: npm run prepare:native && npm run build && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --out-dir=releases/prod --app-id=com.yapflow.app --product-name=YapFlow --sign-identity=- -- --mac
scripts.package:mac:unsigned:test: npm run prepare:native && npm run build && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --out-dir=releases/test --app-id=com.yapflow.app.test --product-name=YapFlow Test --sign-identity=- -- --mac
